creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text: Hey Alex. Changes to Quarterly are really under consideration against it's core principles. Type of things Muhammad pointed, and best efforts about fulfilling the best as possible the different expectations. If it helps (and you probably aware of), change from quarterly to LATEST is straight forward https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/pkg-quarterly-to-latest.72196/
